description_long: This is a stone pagoda with a square base, featuring a series of intricately carved elephant statues supporting the main structure. The pagoda rises in a tiered fashion, with each level slightly receding and culminating in a golden, conical spire at the top. The lower section is adorned with detailed reliefs and steps leading up to a small platform, while the upper section is characterized by ornate arches and decorative moldings. The roof is multi-tiered, each tier marked by a distinct horizontal separation and capped with a golden finish. The structure is surrounded by a manicured lawn and paved walkways, suggesting its placement in a landscaped urban park or temple grounds. The overall appearance is grand and historic, with weathered stone contrasting against the bright gold of the upper tiers.
description: A grand, multi-tiered stone pagoda with golden spire, supported by carved elephant statues and surrounded by manicured lawns and walkways.
description_view_0: This view highlights the elephant statues at the base and the steps leading up to the main platform, with the golden spire prominently visible.
description_view_1: The front-facing arches and the full height of the golden roof tiers are most visible, with less emphasis on the elephant statues.
description_view_2: This side view showcases the row of elephant statues and the layered structure of the pagoda, with the steps partially visible.
description_view_3: The main staircase and entryway are clearly visible, along with the symmetrical arrangement of the elephant statues and the tiered roof.
